languages.text: {n}Вы замечаете, что рука Иждрига была на рукояти ножа только когда он ее оттуда убирает. Изучив ваше лицо, он качает головой.{/n} "Вряд ли. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Комиссары{/d} же сами ничего не делают, только честных солдат на всякое непотребство своими речами совращают".

{n}You only notice Izdrig's hand was on his knife hilt when he pulls it away. After studying your face, he shakes his head.{/n} "Unlikely. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Commissars{/d} don't do anything themselves, they just use their words to goad decent soldiers into every kind of foulness."
languages.original_text: {n}Вы замечаете, что рука Иждрига была на рукояти ножа только когда он ее оттуда убирает. Изучив ваше лицо, он качает головой.{/n} "Вряд ли. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Комиссары{/d} же сами ничего не делают, только честных солдат на всякое непотребство своими речами совращают".

traits.locale_text: {n}You only notice Izdrig's hand was on his knife hilt when he pulls it away. After studying your face, he shakes his head.{/n} "Unlikely. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Commissars{/d} don't do anything themselves, they just use their words to goad decent soldiers into every kind of foulness."

{n}You only notice Izdrig's hand on his knife hilt as he pulls it away. After studying your face, he shakes his head.{/n} "Unlikely. Commissars don't do anything themselves, they just use their words to goad decent soldiers into every kind of foulness."

{n}You only notice Izdrig's hand was on his knife hilt when he pulls it away. After studying your face, he shakes his head.{/n} "Unlikely. Commissars don't do anything themselves, they just use their words to goad decent soldiers into every kind of foulness."

{n}You only notice Izdrig's hand was on his knife hilt when he pulls it away. After studying your face, he shakes his head.{/n} "Unlikely. Commissars don't do anything themselves, they just use their words to goad decent soldiers into every kind of foulness."

{n}You only notice Izdrig's hand was on his knife hilt when he pulls it away. After studying your face, he shakes his head.{/n} "Unlikely. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Commissars{/d} don't do anything themselves, they just use their words to goad decent soldiers into every kind of foulness."

languages.text: {n}Du bemerkst erst als er sie zurückzieht, dass Izdrigs Hand auf dem Griff seines Messers geruht hatte. Er mustert dein Gesicht und schüttelt schließlich den Kopf.{/n} "Wohl kaum. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Kommissare{/d} erledigen nichts selbst, spornen anständige Soldaten mit ihren Worte aber zu allerlei Verbrechen an.
languages.original_text: {n}You only notice Izdrig's hand was on his knife hilt when he pulls it away. After studying your face, he shakes his head.{/n} "Unlikely. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Commissars{/d} don't do anything themselves, they just use their words to goad decent soldiers into every kind of foulness."

traits.locale_text: {n}Du bemerkst erst als er sie zurückzieht, dass Izdrigs Hand auf dem Griff seines Messers geruht hatte. Er mustert dein Gesicht und schüttelt schließlich den Kopf.{/n} "Wohl kaum. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Kommissare{/d} erledigen nichts selbst, spornen anständige Soldaten mit ihren Worte aber zu allerlei Verbrechen an.

languages.text: {n}Vous ne remarquez qu'Izdrig avait la main posée sur son couteau qu'au moment où il la retire. Il vous dévisage et secoue la tête.{/n} « J'en doute. Les {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}commissaires{/d} ne font rien par eux-mêmes, ils se contentent de longs discours pour inciter les braves soldats à commettre toutes sortes d'atrocités. »
languages.original_text: {n}You only notice Izdrig's hand was on his knife hilt when he pulls it away. After studying your face, he shakes his head.{/n} "Unlikely. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Commissars{/d} don't do anything themselves, they just use their words to goad decent soldiers into every kind of foulness."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous ne remarquez qu'Izdrig avait la main posée sur son couteau qu'au moment où il la retire. Il vous dévisage et secoue la tête.{/n} « J'en doute. Les {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}commissaires{/d} ne font rien par eux-mêmes, ils se contentent de longs discours pour inciter les braves soldats à commettre toutes sortes d'atrocités. »

languages.text: {n}Solo adviertes que Izdrig tenía la mano en el cuchillo cuando la aparta de él. Tras escudriñar tu rostro, menea la cabeza.{/n} «Es poco probable. Los {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}comisarios{/d} nunca se ensucian las manos, prefieren incitar a soldados decentes para que cometan toda clase de tropelías».
languages.original_text: {n}You only notice Izdrig's hand was on his knife hilt when he pulls it away. After studying your face, he shakes his head.{/n} "Unlikely. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Commissars{/d} don't do anything themselves, they just use their words to goad decent soldiers into every kind of foulness."

traits.locale_text: {n}Solo adviertes que Izdrig tenía la mano en el cuchillo cuando la aparta de él. Tras escudriñar tu rostro, menea la cabeza.{/n} «Es poco probable. Los {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}comisarios{/d} nunca se ensucian las manos, prefieren incitar a soldados decentes para que cometan toda clase de tropelías».

languages.text: {n}İzdrig'in elinin, bıçağının kabzasında olduğunu ancak o elini çektiğinde fark ediyorsun. Yüzünü inceledikten sonra başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Pek olası değil. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Komiserler{/d} hiçbir şey yapmaz, sözcükleri kullanarak düzgün askerleri pisliğe dönüşmeye teşvik ederler anca."
languages.original_text: {n}You only notice Izdrig's hand was on his knife hilt when he pulls it away. After studying your face, he shakes his head.{/n} "Unlikely. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Commissars{/d} don't do anything themselves, they just use their words to goad decent soldiers into every kind of foulness."

traits.locale_text: {n}İzdrig'in elinin, bıçağının kabzasında olduğunu ancak o elini çektiğinde fark ediyorsun. Yüzünü inceledikten sonra başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Pek olası değil. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Komiserler{/d} hiçbir şey yapmaz, sözcükleri kullanarak düzgün askerleri pisliğe dönüşmeye teşvik ederler anca."

languages.text: {n}直到伊兹德里格松开握刀的手，你才注意到原来他刚刚手一直按在刀柄上。他盯着你的脸看了一会儿，摇了摇头。{/n}“不太可能。{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}政委{/d}们从不亲自动手，他们就靠一张嘴，怂恿正直的士兵去干各种肮脏的勾当。”
languages.original_text: {n}You only notice Izdrig's hand was on his knife hilt when he pulls it away. After studying your face, he shakes his head.{/n} "Unlikely. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Commissars{/d} don't do anything themselves, they just use their words to goad decent soldiers into every kind of foulness."

traits.locale_text: {n}直到伊兹德里格松开握刀的手，你才注意到原来他刚刚手一直按在刀柄上。他盯着你的脸看了一会儿，摇了摇头。{/n}“不太可能。{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}政委{/d}们从不亲自动手，他们就靠一张嘴，怂恿正直的士兵去干各种肮脏的勾当。”

languages.text: {n}イズドリーグの手に刀の柄が握られていることに気づいたのは、彼が刀を引っ込めた時だった。あなたの顔を見つめた後、彼は首を横に振った。{/n}「そんなことはありえない。{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}コミッサール{/d}は自ら何もしない。彼らは言葉を使って、善良な兵士をあらゆる汚い行為へとそそのかすのだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}You only notice Izdrig's hand was on his knife hilt when he pulls it away. After studying your face, he shakes his head.{/n} "Unlikely. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Commissars{/d} don't do anything themselves, they just use their words to goad decent soldiers into every kind of foulness."

traits.locale_text: {n}イズドリーグの手に刀の柄が握られていることに気づいたのは、彼が刀を引っ込めた時だった。あなたの顔を見つめた後、彼は首を横に振った。{/n}「そんなことはありえない。{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}コミッサール{/d}は自ら何もしない。彼らは言葉を使って、善良な兵士をあらゆる汚い行為へとそそのかすのだ。」
